title: Advanced webinars you want to see

posts.author: Julia-monday.com (Julia Fagelman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Community,

We’re currently working on re-making all of our existing on-demand webinars and adding some more to the mix!

I wanted to check with you guys if you feel there’s a topic which hasn’t been covered which would be helpful for you or your team to attend or to watch on demand?

Thanks
Julia
